mapper.select: select FILE_GROUP_NO /* kr.or.ddit.common.file.mapper.IAttachFileMapper.getAttachFile */ , FILE_OG_NAME , FILE_SAVE_UUID , FILE_PATH , FILE_EXT , FILE_SIZE , MIME_TYPE , REG_DT , MDF_DT , FILE_SORT_ORDER , DOWN_CNT , GOOGLE_ID , CAT from attach_file where file_group_no = to_number(#{fileGroupNo}) and file_save_uuid = #{fileSaveUuid}

select FILE_GROUP_NO /* kr.or.ddit.common.file.mapper.IAttachFileMapper.selecAttachFileList */ , FILE_OG_NAME , FILE_SAVE_UUID , FILE_PATH , FILE_EXT , FILE_SIZE , MIME_TYPE , REG_DT , MDF_DT , FILE_SORT_ORDER , DOWN_CNT , GOOGLE_ID , CAT from ATTACH_FILE where FILE_GROUP_NO = to_number(#{fileGroupNo})
